executive_summary: Example.com has strong commercial keyword positioning with healthy backlink growth, but technical issues on the blog template and a major content gap on transactional queries are leaving an estimated 4,000 monthly visits on the table. The single highest-impact action this month is fixing the 5xx errors on /blog/* and publishing the three flagship comparison articles competitors already rank for.

issues.title: 5xx errors on /blog/* template
issues.recommendation: Investigate server logs for blog template; deploy fix and re-submit XML sitemap.
issues.impact: Recovers ~5 indexed pages, potential 800+ monthly visits.

issues.title: Missing meta descriptions on 18 indexable pages
issues.recommendation: Write unique 140-160 char meta descriptions focusing on the page's primary commercial keyword.
issues.impact: Improves CTR on existing rankings — estimated +5-15% click-through.

issues.title: Thin content on /services/* pages (avg 220 words)
issues.recommendation: Expand each service page to 600-1200 words covering the FAQ from competitor pages.
issues.impact: Long-term ranking improvement on commercial intent terms.
